hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.ts"?$'; then cd /Users/nguyenhuuhung/Documents/GitHub/discord-bot && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'landing/.*\.astro"?$'; then cd /Users/nguyenhuuhung/Documents/GitHub/discord-bot/landing && npx astro check 2>&1 | tail -15; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'locales/.*\.json'; then EN_COUNT=$(grep -c '"' src/locales/en.json 2>/dev/null); for f in src/locales/*.json; do F_COUNT=$(grep -c '"' "$f" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$F_COUNT" != "$EN_COUNT" ]; then echo "WARNING: $(basename $f) has $F_COUNT keys vs en.json has $EN_COUNT keys"; fi; done; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.env[^.]|.env"$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Cannot access .env files - use .env.example instead'; exit 2; fi
